description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a loose-fitting hooded sweatshirt with a front pocket and drawstrings. The individual is wearing fitted pants that taper at the ankles and a pair of low-profile sneakers, suitable for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The figure's hair is long and straight, parted to one side, and falls past the shoulders. The posture is upright with arms relaxed and slightly extended outward, suggesting a neutral, at-rest stance. The clothing appears to be made from soft, flexible materials typical of everyday wear, and the shoes are designed for comfort and mobility. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is that of a typical young adult in an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian in a hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, and sneakers, standing upright with long straight hair. The figure has a relaxed, neutral stance and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded sweatshirt, front pocket, drawstrings, and facial features with long hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, the relaxed arm position, and the side silhouette of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hood, straight hair falling down the back, and the back seams of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm position, and the side of the hood and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt and fitted pants
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted to one side
